color_story: Rose-parchment neutrals (H:340°) warm the gallery space; sage green (H:120°) curates emphasis on featured work borders and nav underlines; mustard (H:38°) punctuates signal moments (Pistons score, project highlights). The palette is lifted by full-moon contrast—16:1 text-background ratio—rather than color vibration, and breathing room (80px gutters, zero shadows) signals spring's airy return.
